description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: In the short term before the implementation of the Senior Risk Capital system, Sky will provide Grove with 15 million USDS of Senior Risk Capital. See [A.3.2.2.4.5 - Short Term Transitionary Measures](d33ac81e-bab1-4969-b46d-e605da2afae3). This Senior Risk Capital will not be transferred by Sky to Grove’s SubProxy Account; instead, it will be credited towards Grove’s Total Risk Capital. See [A.3.2.1.2 - Total Risk Capital](be7589f5-32c0-42d2-8d10-38bceb1de28b).
